scripts.db:migrate:dev: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/read-config.mjs server.databaseUrl)" pnpm --filter @sparkle/db exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/read-config.mjs server.databaseUrl)" pnpm --filter @sparkle/db exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:status: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/read-config.mjs server.databaseUrl)" pnpm --filter @sparkle/db exec prisma migrate status
